pi_items.source: Hardcoded as OUTPUT_PATH in export_result.sh and set up in setup_task.sh
VLM prompt in verifier.py explicitly queries for MAP CONTENT, TITLE, LEGEND, SCALE BAR, and NORTH ARROW, which exactly match these 5 elements.
Default value in verifier.py fallback and explicitly passed to the VLM prompt checking the map title.
Used in verifier.py as the minimum size check: file_size > (min_size_kb * 1024).
Hardcoded in verifier.py where score is incremented if width >= 800.
Hardcoded in verifier.py where score is incremented if height >= 600.

privileged_info_summary: The correct output path for the exported map layout is strictly '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/world_map_layout.png'. The output PNG must have dimensions of at least 800x600 pixels and a file size > 50KB. A VLM verification step strictly expects the map to contain a map view, legend, scale bar, north arrow, and exactly the title text 'World Countries Map'. The underlying map dataset consists of real public domain shapefiles from Natural Earth.
